name: Leadenleg
description:
Activate 2 (manipulate)

Once injected, this synthetic toxin sinks into the extremities, numbing them nearly to paralysis.

Saving Throw

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 ] damage and –5-foot status penalty to all Speeds (1 round)

Stage 2 ] damage and –10-foot status penalty to all Speeds (1 round)

Stage 3 ] damage and –20-foot status penalty to all Speeds (1 round)
